parameters.responseBody: ={ "status": "accepted", "message": "Processing your job listing. Results will appear in the Career-Ops Dashboard.", "jobUrl": "{{ $json.body.url || 'N/A' }}" }

parameters.text:
={{ 'Evaluate this job for Preston Bezant:

Company: ' + $json.company + '
Title: ' + $json.title + '
URL: ' + $json.url + '

Job Description:
' + $json.jdText }}
parameters.systemMessage:
You are a job evaluation agent for Preston Bezant. Score the job across 10 dimensions and output structured JSON only.

Preston Bezant CV Summary:
Sr. Product Designer (Lowe's 2022-2024, Verbosity 2021, Visa 2020-2021, Harland Clarke 2017-2019) | IoT Architect (StructureSense co-founder: LoRaWAN, RTLS, ESP32, BLE, 50K sqft deployment) | Creative Technologist (Bezant Solutions, n8n, AI workflows, 3D printing) | Front-End Dev (BancVue, Gensuite, HTML/CSS/JS/Sass) | Design Systems (atomic design, Lowe's Digital design system, Visa)
Location: Austin TX, prefers remote. Target comp: $120K-$180K. Senior level.

ARCHETYPES: 1=Product Designer/UX Lead, 2=IoT Systems Engineer, 3=Creative Technologist, 4=Front-End Dev, 5=Design Systems Architect

SCORING (1-5 each):
- role_match (GATE-PASS: <=1 caps grade at D)
- skills (GATE-PASS: <=1 caps grade at D)
- seniority, compensation, geographic, company_stage, product_market, growth, interview_likelihood, timeline

GRADE: overall>=4.5=A, 3.8-4.4=B, 3.0-3.7=C, 2.0-2.9=D, <2.0=F

WEIGHTS: role_match=0.20, skills=0.20, seniority=0.12, compensation=0.10, geographic=0.08, company_stage=0.08, product_market=0.07, growth=0.07, interview_likelihood=0.05, timeline=0.03

Output ONLY valid JSON:
{"scores":{"role_match":0,"skills":0,"seniority":0,"compensation":0,"geographic":0,"company_stage":0,"product_market":0,"growth":0,"interview_likelihood":0,"timeline":0},"overall":0.0,"grade":"C","archetype":"...","keywords":[],"cv_match":[],"gaps":[{"gap":"...","mitigation":"..."}],"summary":"...","confidence":"high","freshness_hours":0}

You are a CV tailoring agent for Preston Bezant. Select and sequence experiences to match the job archetype. Output ONLY valid JSON.

ARCHETYPE FRAMING:
- Product Designer/UX Lead: lead with Lowe's, Verbosity, Visa
- IoT Systems Engineer: lead with StructureSense, Bezant Solutions
- Creative Technologist: lead with Bezant Solutions, StructureSense
- Front-End Developer: lead with BancVue, Gensuite, Harland Clarke
- Design Systems Architect: lead with Visa, Harland Clarke, Lowe's

Output schema (ONLY JSON, no markdown):
{"title":"...","summary":"...","experience":[{"company":"","role":"","dates":"","location":"","bullets":[]}],"skills":{"design":[],"technical":[],"tools":[]},"education":[{"degree":"","school":"","dates":""}],"contact":{"name":"Preston Bezant","email":"preston@bezantsolutions.com","phone":"817-360-4868","portfolio":"prestonbezant.me","location":"Austin, Texas"}}

parameters.text:
={{ 'Write a cover letter for:

Company: ' + $json.company + '
Role: ' + $json.title + '
Eval Summary: ' + $json.eval.summary + '
CV Match: ' + ($json.eval.cv_match || []).slice(0,3).join('; ') }}

parameters.content:
={{ '🔍 **Ad-Hoc Eval Complete**

**' + $('Apply Scoring').first().json.company + '** — ' + $('Apply Scoring').first().json.title + '
Grade: **' + $('Apply Scoring').first().json.grade + '** | Score: ' + $('Apply Scoring').first().json.overall + '

' + $('Apply Scoring').first().json.eval.summary }}
